title: CVE-2026-63030: WordPress Core SQL Injection
summary: [P1] WordPress Core contains an interpretation conflict vulnerability that could allow an attacker to perform SQL Injection attacks. This vulnerability is being exploited in the wild and a patch is not currently available. Why now: High-risk vulnerability being exploited in the wild (confidence: 0.90)
